description: The Turkish mafia is a general term for criminal organizations based in Turkey or composed of Turkish citizens. They are active in drug trafficking, especially heroin, and have expanded into cocaine trafficking with partnerships in South America. They also engage in human trafficking, illegal gambling, and extortion in Turkey and European countries with Turkish communities. Some members have ties to the Turkish deep state and far-right groups like the Grey Wolves.
